case_title: KAHID KHALILI VS. CLOSET BY DESIGN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KHALILI, KAHID AS TO DEFENDANT CLOSET BY DESIGN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALILI, KAHID ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-17-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLOSET BY DESIGN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2013 BY THERESEA MOORE. BOTH PARTIES APPEARING IN PRO PER. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED BY PLAINTIFF AND RETAINED. CLERK: B.PAREDES. DEPT. 525. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHALILI, KAHID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLOSET BY DESIGN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CLOSET BY DESIGN
